name: external-agents
description: Run external coding-agent CLIs (agy, codex, cursor, optionally claude) as autonomous sub-agents from inside Claude Code. Dispatch one prompt to a single external agent or fan it out to all in parallel, read-write by default (--read-only available), and collect every response inline. The cursor agent runs Cursor's own models (Composer 2.5). Generalises the council's read-only eval panel into a delegation tool.
